Public ReadOnly Property PrivateIpAddress As String
member this.PrivateIpAddress : string

Docs.summary: The private IP address of the member cluster private FQDN. This is a read-only property populated by the service.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier SubnetResourceId { get; set; }
.property instance class Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier SubnetResourceId
Public Property SubnetResourceId As ResourceIdentifier
member this.SubnetResourceId : Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier with get, set

Docs.summary: The delegated subnet resource ID. Customer can provide their own subnet, or AKS will allocate one if not specified. When providing your own subnet, the minimum required size is /28.
